description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable magazine. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel, with a front post and rear notch. The magazine is prominently curved and appears to be made of metal, matching the receiver. The trigger, trigger guard, and safety selector are visible on the side, along with a charging handle. The overall design is reminiscent of the iconic AK-47, commonly seen in urban and military contexts.
description: A dark metal and wood assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, resembling an AK-47.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and a hint of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the opposite profile, including the magazine, trigger, and the charging handle on the receiver.
